channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overflowing bin, 25th April
item.description:
Overflowing bin outside the wok wagon old Cheltenham rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Old Cheltenham Road, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pilgrove way after the roundabout at bushy way on the right smashed up glass, 25th April
item.description:
Lots of smashed up glass that is dangerous not only for wildlife but people out dog walking. My dog has already had a cut on his pad from broken glass everywhere. Why not get the people doing community payback to go out cleaning the streets rather than just sat fagging in Springfield Park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Cornmeadow Drive, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep potholes throughout the road, 25th April
item.description:
Old Gloucester Rd. Traffic having to drive on the wrong side of the road to avoid damaging cars. Try travelling on a bus that has to go over the horrendous potholes and see what it feels like. The road is not fit for vehicles. Try resurfacing it in a proper manner before someone sues the council for damages.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rats living in crack in paving slab in alleg, 25th April
item.description:
Saw a brown rat go into crack under paving slab at ///smug.weedy.falls hygiene issues as restaurants adjacent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection., 25th April
item.description:
Volunteer litter pick bags ready for collection. Two bags, one containing general litter and the other cans/plastic bottles for recycling. Cheltenham Road, Longlevens. Opposite Pearman Briggs Caravans. Next to dog waste bin: 0273 What three words location: ///lunge.laminate.fittingly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucestershire Cycle Spine, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection

item.title: Perspex broken, 25th April
item.description:
Perspex is broken, outside sofas & stuff Stop is called Holy Trinity Church (heading towards Pittville Street)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31-39, Portland Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tarmac pavement breaking up due to weeds., 25th April
item.description:
Outside no. 44 Brookfield Road. Weeds are gradually breaking up the pavement. It's been getting gradually worse since we moved in 8 years ago. We can manually remove the weeds but the pavement is still being damaged every time they grow back through.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookfield Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface
